name: RECURSION PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
business: Recursion Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage TechBio company that uses an AI-native platform, the Recursion Operating System (OS), for drug discovery and development. The company has a portfolio of wholly-owned and partnered programs in oncology and rare disease. It generates revenue through research and development agreements with pharmaceutical companies.

exposures.sentence: Recursion is a clinical-stage TechBio company with a mission to decode biology to radically improve lives. We have advanced a portfolio of differentiated internal programs and strategic partnerships powered by our integrated drug discovery and development platform, the Recursion Operating System (OS).
We largely train models using our own supercomputer, BioHive-2, one of the largest supercomputers in biopharma, built in collaboration with NVIDIA.
We have generated one of the largest relatable data sets in biopharma using our automated high throughput labs, which can run over 2 million experiments per week.

catalysts.event: REC-1245 early Phase 1 safety and PK monotherapy data
catalysts.sentence: Early Phase 1 safety and PK monotherapy data expected in 1H26

catalysts.event: REC-4881 FDA engagement to define registration path
catalysts.sentence: In the first half of 2026, we expect to engage with the FDA to define a registration path for REC-4881.

catalysts.event: Inducement of $4 million milestone payment from Sanofi
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we achieved our fifth milestone across the collaboration, generating a $4 million payment from Sanofi.

catalysts.event: REC-7735 and REC-102 go/no-go decision on Phase 1 initiation
catalysts.sentence: Go/no-go decisions on the initiation of Phase 1 studies for REC-7735 (PI3K H1047Ri) and REC-102 (ENPP1i) are expected in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: REC-617 early combination safety and PK data
catalysts.sentence: early combination safety and PK data for REC-617 (CDK7i) ... will be reported in the first half of 2027

catalysts.event: REC-3565 early monotherapy safety and PK data
catalysts.sentence: early monotherapy safety and PK data for REC-3565 (MALT1i) will be reported in the first half of 2027

catalysts.event: REC-4539 early monotherapy safety and PK data
catalysts.sentence: early monotherapy safety and PK data for REC-4539 (LSD1i) reported in the second half of that year

catalysts.event: Additional Phase 1b/2 clinical data for REC-4881
catalysts.sentence: Additional Phase 1b/2 clinical data expected in 1H27

tamClaims.claim: FAP affects more than 50,000 patients in the US and EU5.
tamClaims.sentence: FAP is a rare, inherited tumor predisposition syndrome affecting more than 50,000 patients in the US and EU5

tamClaims.claim: REC-1245 has over 100,000 addressable patients in the US and EU5 each year.
tamClaims.sentence: With over 100,000 addressable patients in the US and EU5 each year

tamClaims.claim: Potential indications for REC-617 have an addressable population of approximately 150,000 drug-treatable patients per year in the US and EU5.
tamClaims.sentence: Potential specific indications include ovarian cancer, HR+ breast cancer, triple negative breast cancer, pancreatic cancer, ovarian cancer, head and neck cancer, and NSCLC for which we estimate an addressable population of approximately 150,000 drug-treatable patients per year in the US and EU5.

tamClaims.claim: Global investment in AI-enabled drug discovery has grown to several billions of dollars annually.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry reports estimate that a majority of large biopharmaceutical companies now employ AI/ML in some aspect of drug discovery or development, and global investment in AI-enabled drug discovery has grown to several billions of dollars annually.
